title: PanoWorld: Real-World Panoramic Generation
innovation_summary: PanoWorld: Real-World Panoramic Generation: Building on this insight, we propose PanoWorld, which simplifies camera trajectories into translations via fixed headings for both current-action modeling and long-range memory through Dense Panoramic.
